name: Make.com MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Make.com (formerly Integromat) MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Make's visual automation platform — managing scenarios, triggering workflows, monitoring execution history, and integrating 1,000+ app connections into agent-driven automation.
use_cases: Triggering Make scenarios from event-driven agents
Monitoring scenario execution status from ops agents
Creating and updating scenarios from workflow automation agents
Querying execution history for debugging and analytics agents
Managing webhooks and data stores from integration agents
Building complex multi-app workflows from AI orchestration agents
not_for: Teams using Zapier, n8n, or Tines for automation
High-frequency real-time processing (Make is better for batch workflows)
Code-first automation (use n8n or Temporal instead)
best_when: An agent needs to trigger or manage visual automation workflows in Make.com — especially for connecting multiple SaaS apps without code.
avoid_when: You're using Zapier, n8n, or another automation platform.

auth.notes: Make API tokens at team or user level. No scope granularity — full account access. Webhook URLs for inbound triggers.

pricing.paid_tiers: Core: $9/month for 10K ops; Pro: $16 for 10K ops; Teams: $29
pricing.notes: Operation-based pricing. Free tier available. Each step in a scenario is an 'operation'. Good for moderate automation volume. MCP server is open source.

performance.rate_limits: API: 50 requests/minute; scenario execution limits by plan

known_agent_gotchas: Scenario IDs and team IDs required — discover before use
Scenario execution is async — agents must poll for completion
Operations quota is consumed per step — agents must be aware of costs
Webhook scenarios require unique URL per trigger
API token has no scope granularity — full account access
Make zones (EU vs US) have different API endpoints
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token lacks scopes. SOC 2, GDPR, ISO 27001. EU data residency available.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token lacks scopes. SOC 2, GDPR, ISO 27001. EU data residency.
